Kartik Gupta

Backend Engineer & Cloud Architect

I engineer robust backend systems that power products at scale. From high-throughput APIs to cloud-native infrastructure on AWS, I turn complex problems into dependable production solutions.

5 Years of Experience
6+ Production Systems
5M+ API Requests Handled
99.9% Uptime Delivered

Projects

Poshan Tracker

Led backend modernization for a national public-health platform, improving reliability, scale, and response times for critical citizen services.

Portfolio Website

Built a fast, searchable portfolio experience that presents my work clearly while keeping content easy to update through structured data.

XIRR Calculator

Delivered a secure financial tool that helps users calculate complex investment returns with confidence and minimal friction.

DigiBot

Created an AI assistant that turns document collections into a conversational knowledge layer for faster, more accurate information access.

NFC Payment Application

Explored secure mobile payments through NFC, focusing on trust, authentication, and safe user transactions in a real-world interaction model.

Elite Creative Group

Delivered a polished digital presence for a creative agency, improving how the brand presented its work and services online.
